zh.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado是Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas和Dama De Crucado的兒子，於1200年出生在西班牙。他和Elvira Martínez de Ayala至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado是Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas和Dama De Crucado的儿子，于1200年出生在西班牙。他和Elvira Martínez de Ayala至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rojas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jorge, Jesus, Francisco, Pedro, Ricardo, Rafael, Raul.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the places called Rojas in Burgos province, from a derivative of rojo ‘red’. Compare Rojano and Roxas .

variants.name: Roxas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Nestor, Rodolfo, Francisco, Manuel, Ramon, Ana, Annaliza, Arsenio, Aureo, Beatriz, Cristina.
Spanish: variant of   Rojas  . This surname is very rare in Spain; it is found mainly in the Philippines.

variants.name: Rojano
meanings: Spanish: habitational name for someone from Rojas (see Rojas ) or another place called with rojo or roja ‘red’, from an adjectival form of the placename.

nameMeanings.name: Fernán
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

variants.name: Hernán
meanings: Variant of   Fernando .

variants.name: Hernando
meanings: Variant of   Fernando .

nameMeanings.name: González
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Jorge, Pedro, Francisco, Miguel, Ramon, Raul, Mario.
Spanish (González): patronymic from the personal name Gonzalo . Compare De Gonzalez , Gonsales , Gunsalus , and Portuguese Goncalves .

variants.name: Gonzelez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsalez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Ruben, Ignacio, Manuel, Alfredo, Elena, Felipe, Guadalupe, Gustavo, Jesus, Jorge.
Hispanic (Gonsález): altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gongalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzolas
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonsales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Ruben, Arcadio, Artemio, Erasmo, Ernesto, Eusebio, Juan, Lupe, Manuel, Miguel.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Visigothic: from a personal name formed with gund ‘battle, strife’.

variants.name: De Gonzalez
meanings: Spanish (De González): patronymic from González (see Gonzalez ), with the preposition de ‘of’.

variants.name: Gozalez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish González (see Gonzalez ).

variants.name: Gonzales
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Ruben, Pedro, Raul, Guadalupe, Lupe.
Spanish: altered form of González (see Gonzalez ).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado was born in 1200, in Spain as the son of Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas and Dama De Crucado. He had at least 1 daughter with Elvira Martínez de Ayala.

fr.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado est né en 1200, à Espagne, fils de Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas et Dama De Crucado. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Elvira Martínez de Ayala.

de.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado wurde 1200 in Spanien, als Sohn von Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas und Dama De Crucado geboren. Er hatte mit Elvira Martínez de Ayala mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado è nato il nel 1200 nel Spagna come figlio di Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas e Dama De Crucado. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Elvira Martínez de Ayala.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçadoは1200年にスペインでGonzalo Alfonso de RojasとDama De Crucadoの息子として生まれた。彼はElvira Martínez de Ayalaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado(은)는 1200년 스페인에서 Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas(와)과 Dama De Crucado의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Elvira Martínez de Ayala(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado nasceu em 1200, em Espanha filho de Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas e Dama De Crucado. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Elvira Martínez de Ayala.

ru.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado родился в 1200 г. в местности Испания. Его родителей звали Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas и Dama De Crucado. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Elvira Martínez de Ayala.

es.lifeSummary: Fernán González de Rojas Cruçado nació en 1200, en España como hijo de Gonzalo Alfonso de Rojas y Dama De Crucado. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Elvira Martínez de Ayala.
